item.title: AI Is Getting a Ticker, an Agent, and a Body
item.description: Why the second AI revolution may be bigger — and riskier — than the firstSinclair HuangAI Infrastructure Notes｜Article 5*Field Note v4 — updated with GTC Taipei and statistical-science reference mater
